title: Distinct Dyes
description: Gives all dyes a different texture, making them easier to tell apart. Works for any version that supports resourcepacks (1.6.1+)! Useful for the colorblind.
body:
## A resourcepack that changes every dye by improving its color, as well as giving every single one a unique texture
This resourcepack works for any version over 1.6.1. 
On versions below 1.14, bonemeal, lapis, ink sacs and cocoa beans have different textures, as the black, white and brown dye weren't added until 1.14
Above 1.14 the only thing changed is the dyes.
![16 minecraft dyes shown in a 4x4 square, with bonemeal, cocoa beans, lapis lazuli and an ink sac on the right side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e04f82b9f570ae623cdae3a1e697a608559448.png)
The one file provided works for all supported versions.

I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne
